parsed.production_notes: The top panel features a clearly AI-generated robotic avatar with unnatural lip-sync and static framing. The bottom panel appears to be human-recorded footage, though the lip-sync is slightly mismatched, suggesting dubbing or AI manipulation.

characters.appearance: Young female face, short dark wavy hair, fair complexion. Attached to a futuristic robotic body. Symmetrical, slightly uncanny features.
characters.wardrobe: White and light blue metallic robotic suit with glowing blue neck accents.

characters.appearance: Young adult Indian woman, medium complexion, dark straight shoulder-length hair. Natural appearance.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, transitioning from hesitant to excited.

scenes.setting: Top: blurred bright office. Bottom: indoor room near a window with blue frames.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman's face is integrated into a white and blue robotic torso, centered in the frame. The background is a bright, blurred interior space with large windows. Lighting is even, highlighting metallic textures. The character maintains a static posture.

A young woman stands indoors holding a smartphone, facing slightly left. Behind her is a window with bright blue frames. The background is slightly blurred with a hint of a plant. She wears a pink t-shirt and her expressions change dynamically.

scenes.visual_description: Horizontal split-screen. Top half shows an AI robotic avatar speaking. Bottom half shows a young woman reacting to her phone. They appear to converse.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: मुझे वो पसंद है। [I like him.]
Character B says: I like him.
Character B says: मैं उससे प्यार करती हूँ। [I love him.]
Character B says: I love him.
Character B says: मैं उससे शादी करना चाहती हूँ। [I want to marry him.]
Character B says: I want to marry him.
Character B says: पता नहीं मैं कब ऐसी इंग्लिश बोल पाऊँगी। [I don't know when I'll be able to speak English like this.]
Character A says: Don't worry.
Character A says: मेरे साथ रोज़ ऐसे दस-पंद्रह मिनट प्रैक्टिस करोगे तो आराम से सीख जाओगे। [If you practice with me like this for 10-15 minutes every day, you will learn easily.]
Character B says: पर गलत इंग्लिश बोलने पे मुझे शर्म आती है। [But I feel shy when I speak incorrect English.]
Character A says: मैं एक एआई टीचर हूँ। [I am an AI teacher.]
Character A says: ना ही मैं तुम्हें जज करूँगी, ना ही तुम्हारा मज़ाक उड़ाऊँगी। [Neither will I judge you, nor will I make fun of you.]
Character B says: और मैं आपसे इंग्लिश कहाँ से सीख सकती हूँ? [And where can I learn English from you?]
Character A says: तुम्हें ज़्यादा कुछ नहीं करना। [You don't have to do much.]
Character A says: बस इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड कर लो। [Just download the English Seekho app.]
Character A says: ये एक इंग्लिश स्पीकिंग सीखने का ऐप है। [This is an English speaking learning app.]
Character A says: जहाँ मेरे जैसे एआई टीचर्स तुम्हें रोज़ इंग्लिश बोलना और प्रैक्टिस करना सिखाएंगे। [Where AI teachers like me will teach you to speak and practice English every day.]
Character A says: और बीस दिनों में तुम इंग्लिश बोलना सीख जाओगी। [And in 20 days you will learn to speak English.]
Character B says: फिर तो ये ऐप महँगा भी होगा ना? [Then this app must be expensive too, right?]
Character A says: महँगा नहीं, सस्ता बोलो। [Not expensive, say cheap.]
Character A says: सिर्फ एक रुपये का ट्रायल ले सकते हो। [You can take a trial for just one rupee.]
Character B says: अरे, मुझे पहले क्यों नहीं पता चला इस ऐप के बारे में? [Oh, why didn't I know about this app earlier?]
Character B says: मैं अभी डाउनलोड करती हूँ इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप। [I will download the English Seekho app right now.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is displayed vertically in the center against a solid light purple background. The phone screen is blank white. Below the phone is a blank rectangular button.

scenes.visual_description: End-card graphic with a smartphone mockup displaying the app logo. A purple install button is below it on a light purple background.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]

scenes.visual_description: A black screen displaying a white text disclaimer.
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
